headline: Wall Street Analysts See Prologis (PLD) as a Buy: Should You Invest?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Prologis (PLD) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
